triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness must block PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
risks: A PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence if missing fields are ignored.

actions.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand router schema already implements evidence missing and clarify blocker logic in src/demand/router.ts, verified by existing test cases in __tests__/demand-router.test.ts

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing array has actionable items (line 496-501), and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker when recommendation is clarify (line 503-508)
evidence.why: Core blocker generation logic for missing and clarify recommendations

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness function calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence agent result (line 726-732), aggregating all blockers into the final readiness assessment
evidence.why: Integration point where evidence blockers affect PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' verifies that missing: ['Need product owner confirmation...'] and recommendation: 'clarify' generate EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers, preventing prd_ready from becoming true
evidence.why: Existing test coverage validates the blocker behavior

evidence.summary: prd_ready is computed as blockers.length === 0, ensuring any blocker prevents readiness
evidence.why: Final gating logic that ensures blockers actually prevent PRD readiness

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing function filters out non-missing status notes like 'no missing data identified' from missing arrays, ensuring only actionable missing items trigger blockers
evidence.why: Prevents false positive blockers from status notes

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem function identifies phrases like 'no missing data identified' and 'all required evidence tasks completed' as status notes rather than actual missing items
evidence.why: Supports sanitizeMissing logic by recognizing status patterns

risks: If evidenceResultBlockingIssues logic is bypassed or blockers are filtered out later in the pipeline, missing and clarify recommendations would not block readiness as intended
Test coverage may not cover all edge cases like missing arrays with mixed actionable and status items

result.notes: The claim is fully verified by project code and tests. The demand router schema already implements evidence missing and clarify blocker logic correctly. No implementation gaps found.

agent_results.claim: Cross-check confirms: YOLO demand router schema correctly implements evidence missing and clarify blocker logic. All explorer claims verified with independent reads.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0, with message listing unresolved missing items
evidence.why: Core blocker generation for missing evidence claims

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker when recommendation is 'clarify', blocking PRD readiness until resolved
evidence.why: Core blocker generation for clarification recommendations

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates evidence agent results and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each, aggregating all blockers into blockerList
evidence.why: Integration point where individual evidence blockers affect readiness assessment

evidence.summary: prd_ready computed as blockers.length === 0, ensuring any evidence blocker prevents readiness
evidence.why: Final gating logic that guarantees blockers prevent PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test validates missing: ['Need product owner confirmation...'] with recommendation: 'clarify' generates both EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers, and asserts prd_ready is false
evidence.why: Test coverage validates blocker behavior and readiness gating

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing filters items using isNonMissingStatusItem, preventing status notes from triggering false positive blockers
evidence.why: Prevents non-actionable status items from becoming blockers

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem recognizes patterns like 'no missing data identified' and 'all required evidence tasks completed' as status notes, not actual missing items
evidence.why: Supports sanitizeMissing by identifying status note patterns

result.notes: All explorer claims independently verified. The implementation correctly generates blockers for missing evidence and clarify recommendations, tests validate the behavior, and prd_ready gating works as specified. No conflicts or discrepancies found.

agent_results.claim: Verification complete: Gathered evidence from explorer and cross-checker is sufficient to support PRD readiness. No assumptions presented as facts, all evidence paths are usable and verified, and no unresolved missing data remains.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function verified by both explorer and cross-checker with independent reads
evidence.why: Core blocker generation logic independently confirmed

evidence.summary: Test case validated by both agents independently
evidence.why: Behavioral verification through existing test coverage

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing function verified by both agents
evidence.why: Prevents false positive blockers from status notes
Integration layer where blockers affect readiness

evidence.summary: prd_ready gating logic confirmed as blockers.length === 0

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker both completed with high confidence, zero assumptions, zero missing items, and identical proceed recommendations. All evidence is from project code and tests with verified line ranges. The claim about evidence missing and clarify blocker logic is fully supported by implementation and tests. No unresolved blockers or assumptions remain that would prevent PRD readiness.
